selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 环, 环形物, 拳击场, 戒指, 角逐, 小集团, 铃声, 钟声, 声调；vt. 包围, 套住, 按铃, 敲钟
words.definition: n. a characteristic sound

words.translation: n. 男孩
n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的
words.definition: n. English phonetician; one of the founders of modern phonetics (1845-1912)

words.translation: num. 十二, 十二个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of eleven and one

words.translation: n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的
words.definition: n. money extracted as a penalty

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 太阳, 日, 日光, 阳光；vt. 晒
words.definition: n. the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system

words.translation: n. 吹, 打击, 殴打, 花开；v. 吹, 风吹, 吹响, 开花
words.definition: n. a powerful stroke with the fist or a weapon

words.translation: a. 骄傲的, 自大的, 自豪的, 辉煌的, 壮丽的
words.definition: a. feeling self-respect or pleasure in something by which you measure your self-worth; or being a reason for pride

words.translation: n. 茶, 茶叶
words.definition: n. a beverage made by steeping tea leaves in water

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘
words.definition: n. a local and well-defined elevation of the land

words.translation: n. 赛跑, 流出, 运转；a. 流动的, 跑着的, 连续的
words.definition: n. the state of being in operation

words.translation: adv. 的确, 实在, 真正地, 甚至
words.definition: r. in truth (often tends to intensify)

words.translation: n. 步行, 步态；a. 步行的, 步行用的
n. 船, 舰；vt. 以船运送, 装船, 运送
words.definition: n. a vessel that carries passengers or freight

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂
words.definition: v. deliver by singing

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: n. 横杆, 围栏, 栏杆, 铁轨, 扶手, 秧鸡；vt. 以横木围栏, 给...铺铁轨
words.definition: n. short for railway

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: n. 乐趣, 玩笑, 娱乐；vi. 开玩笑
words.definition: n. activities that are enjoyable or amusing

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: a. 真实的, 正确的, 忠诚的, 可靠的, 纯粹的, 正式的；n. 真实, 准确
words.definition: a. consistent with fact or reality; not false

words.translation: n. 窗户, 窗子, 窗口；vt. 给...开窗
words.definition: n. a framework of wood or metal that contains a glass windowpane and is built into a wall or roof to admit light or air

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: n. 女孩, 少女, 女佣
words.definition: n. a young woman

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: s. of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies

words.translation: n. 走, 散步, 步行, 行走的路程, 竞走, 散步场所；vi. 走路, 步行, 处世
words.definition: n. the act of traveling by foot

words.translation: n. 碗, 木球, 大酒杯；v. 滚木球, 快而稳地行驶
words.definition: n. a round vessel that is open at the top; used chiefly for holding food or liquids;

words.translation: n. 帽子；vt. 给...戴帽子
words.definition: n. headdress that protects the head from bad weather; has shaped crown and usually a brim

words.translation: num. 五, 五个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of four and one

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地
words.definition: a. relatively deep or strong; affecting one deeply

words.translation: n. 花, 开花植物, 精华, 盛时；vi. 开花, 发育, 旺盛, 成熟
words.definition: n. a plant cultivated for its blooms or blossoms

words.translation: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
words.definition: n. a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: n. 心跳(声), 打, 敲打声, 拍子；v. 打, 拍打, 打败
words.definition: n. a regular route for a sentry or policeman

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展
words.definition: v. become larger, greater, or bigger; expand or gain

words.translation: n. 笑, 笑声；vi. 笑, 大笑
words.definition: n. the sound of laughing

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的
words.definition: n. an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: n. 姐妹, 姐, 妹, 护士, 修女；vt. 姐妹般对待
words.definition: n. a female person who has the same parents as another person

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: n. 管, 导管, 输送管, 管状器官, 声带, 尖细的声音, 烟斗, 笛, 管乐器；vt. 以管输送, 吹哨子, 吹奏, 尖声唱
words.definition: n. a tube with a small bowl at one end; used for smoking tobacco

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的
a. 很少的, 微小的
n. 王子, 亲王, 国君, 贵族, 诸侯, 有权势的大人物
words.definition: n. a male member of a royal family other than the sovereign (especially the son of a sovereign)

words.translation: n. 船；vi. 乘船
words.definition: n. a small vessel for travel on water

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: a. 快乐的, 幸福的, 愉快的, 恰当的
words.definition: a. enjoying or showing or marked by joy or pleasure

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: n. 主人, 硕士, 大师, 母机；a. 主人的, 主要的
words.definition: n. directs the work of others

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: a. pleasant or pleasing or agreeable in nature or appearance

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个
words.definition: r. not at all or in no way

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: r. used in polite request

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: a. 忧愁的, 悲哀的
words.definition: a. experiencing or showing sorrow or unhappiness

words.translation: n. 九月
words.definition: n. the month following August and preceding October

words.translation: a. 慢的, 缓慢的, 迟缓的, 迟钝的, 冷漠的, 落后的；adv. 慢地, 迟缓地
words.definition: a. not moving quickly; taking a comparatively long time

words.translation: v. 相信
words.definition: v. accept as true; take to be true

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 种类, 性质, 方式；a. 亲切的, 仁慈的, 和蔼的
words.definition: n. a category of things distinguished by some common characteristic or quality

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: adv. 也许, 大概
n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: n. 排, 行, 街道, 划船, 吵闹；vt. 使成排, 划, 划船, 参加(赛船), 痛骂
words.definition: n. an arrangement of objects or people side by side in a line

words.translation: vi. 说, 说话, 演说, 发言；vt. 说, 讲, 说出
words.definition: v. use language

words.translation: n. 站立, 站住, 停顿, 讲台, 看台, 立场, 法院证人席；vi. 站, 立, 坐落, 停滞, 位于, 坚持, 维持原状
words.definition: n. the position where a thing or person stands

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: a. 古代的, 古老的, 年老的, 旧的
words.definition: s. belonging to times long past especially of the historical period before the fall of the Western Roman Empire

words.translation: n. 铃, 钟
words.definition: n. a hollow device made of metal that makes a ringing sound when struck

words.translation: n. 思想, 愿望, 智力, 记忆, 心理, 情绪, 理智, 主意, 心意；vi. 介意, 注意, 留心
words.definition: n. that which is responsible for one's thoughts and feelings; the seat of the faculty of reason

words.translation: adv. 到某处, 在某处
words.definition: r. in or at or to some place; (`someplace' is used informally for `somewhere')

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地
words.definition: s. isolated from others

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: n. 厨子, 厨师；vt. 烹调, 煮饭, 加热
words.definition: n. someone who cooks food

words.translation: n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
words.definition: n. absence of light or illumination

words.translation: a. 死的, 不活泼的, 麻木的, 熄灭的；n. 死者
words.definition: a. no longer having or seeming to have or expecting to have life

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: a. acting or moving or capable of acting or moving quickly

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的
words.definition: n. coins made of gold

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: n. 春天, 弹簧, 跳跃, 弹性, 活力, 泉, 源泉；a. 春天的
words.definition: n. the season of growth

words.translation: n. 夏季, 全盛时期；vi. 避暑, 过夏天
words.definition: n. the warmest season of the year; in the northern hemisphere it extends from the summer solstice to the autumnal equinox

words.translation: n. 翅膀, 翼, 机翼, 派别；vt. 给...装上翼, 飞过, 使飞, 空运, 增加...速度
words.definition: n. a movable organ for flying (one of a pair)

words.translation: n. 希望, 愿望, 祝愿, 命令, 请求；vt. 愿, 想要, 希望, 祝愿
words.definition: n. a specific feeling of desire

words.translation: n. 奇迹, 惊奇, 惊愕；vt. 惊奇, 想知道
words.definition: n. the feeling aroused by something strange and surprising

words.translation: n. 伦敦
words.definition: n. the capital and largest city of England; located on the Thames in southeastern England; financial and industrial and cultural center

words.translation: vt. 接受, 承认, 同意, 相信, 赞成, 承担, 承兑, 采纳, 接纳, 容忍；vi. 同意
words.definition: v. consider or hold as true

words.translation: n. 兄弟
words.definition: n. a male with the same parents as someone else

words.translation: n. 课程, 路线, 过程, 一道菜, 道路；v. 追, (使)跑
words.definition: n. education imparted in a series of lessons or meetings

words.translation: n. 杯子, 茶杯, 优胜杯；vt. 使成杯状, 为...拔火罐
words.definition: n. a small open container usually used for drinking; usually has a handle

words.translation: vi. 拉, 拖, 拔剑；vt. 拖拉, 挨近, 领取, 打成平局, 引导, 抽签决定, 画, 描写, 制订, 草拟, 吸引
n. 事实, 真实性, 真相, 细节, 论据
words.definition: n. a piece of information about circumstances that exist or events that have occurred

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: vi. 发生, 发生, 恰巧
words.definition: v. come to pass

words.translation: n. 小时, 钟头, 时间, ...点钟, 课时
words.definition: n. a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day

words.translation: n. 会议, 会面
words.definition: n. a formally arranged gathering

words.translation: n. 金钱, 一笔款, 财富, 货币, 金额
words.definition: n. the most common medium of exchange; functions as legal tender

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲
words.definition: n. an artistic form of auditory communication incorporating instrumental or vocal tones in a structured and continuous manner

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
